stations.name: Closest stations are Coorparoo and Holland Park (drive)

buses.note: Bus routes serve Mount Gravatt via Logan Road and the South-East Busway. The Garden City interchange is a major bus hub.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 15 to 20 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Westfield Garden City is one of the largest shopping centres in Brisbane. Logan Road has additional retail and dining clusters.

pockets.name: Mount Gravatt summit area
pockets.character: Streets close to the lookout. Established residential character.

pockets.name: Family streets near Mount Gravatt SS

buyer_profile.note: Buyers targeting the catchment and family-suburb feel.

buyer_profile.type: Buyers priced out of inner south
buyer_profile.note: Buyers priced out of Coorparoo or Camp Hill who want larger blocks at a more accessible price.
